design_principles: Visual-first, text-minimal: Pedagogy through interaction, not reading. If a screen is mostly text, it has failed.
Science Museum + Engineering Blueprint: Clean, neutral, optimistic, and highly structured.
Vendor-neutral: No military/defense aesthetics, no contractor logos, no toy aesthetics.
Instrument Panel Feel: Technical typography for numerics, sharp geometries, and dedicated widget zones.

headings.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-text_primary

spacing_and_layout.generous_whitespace: Use p-12 to p-24 between major vertical sections to allow the science to 'breathe'.
spacing_and_layout.instrument_padding: p-6 md:p-8 for cards and interactive widgets.

components.card: bg-white border-2 border-neutral-200 rounded-sm p-6 shadow-sm hover:border-primary transition-colors duration-200
components.interactive_widget_panel: bg-[#0A0A0A] rounded-md border border-neutral-800 p-6 shadow-xl overflow-hidden relative
components.button_primary: bg-primary text-white font-['JetBrains_Mono'] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm px-8 py-4 rounded-sm border-2 border-primary hover:bg-primary_hover hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111111] transition-all duration-200
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-text_primary font-['JetBrains_Mono'] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm px-8 py-4 rounded-sm border-2 border-neutral-300 hover:border-text_primary hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111111] transition-all duration-200
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-['JetBrains_Mono'] font-medium bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-800 border border-neutral-200

motion.philosophy: Motion is pedagogy. Use animations strictly to explain cause-and-effect state changes (e.g., slider moves -> graph trace draws). No decorative bouncing.
motion.data_change: animate-pulse for 300ms when a value updates.

icons.rules: Use stroke-width 1.5. Clean, technical geometry. Avoid filled or playful icons.

image_urls.description: Sleek modern white drone isolated on a clean background, ideal for the hero section.
Macro circuit board / technical sensing unit for sensing and perception modules.
Architectural / geometric abstract lines serving as tech-neutral background textures.
Flock of birds representing the swarm autonomy concept neutrally.

accessibility.testing_requirements: All interactive elements, buttons, menus, and form inputs MUST include a `data-testid` attribute formatted as kebab-case-role (e.g. data-testid='start-lesson-button').
accessibility.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA compliance. Use high-contrast borders and text.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Shadcn default styling blindly. Override radii to 'rounded-sm' and borders to 2px to match the 'Engineering Blueprint' aesthetic.
Use Recharts for the PID Tuner graph and Dronability Assessment radar chart.
Implement the 'Interactive Widget Panel' in dark mode to contrast with the light theme page, giving it a tactile 'Instrument Panel' feel.
Ensure all fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono) are imported and applied correctly.
For 3D elements (Exploded Drone), if React Three Fiber is too complex for the MVP, use a layered 2.5D interactive SVG or high-res image with absolutely positioned interactive 'hotspots' that pulse.
Text must be minimal. Replace descriptive paragraphs with tooltips, side-panel take-aways, or data-readouts.
